title: Alert enrichment interpolates an attacker-controlled path into elevated PowerShell
recommendation: Remove path interpolation from PowerShell source. Prefer WinVerifyTrust, or bind the path as a separate parameter to a constant script and use -LiteralPath; regression-test quotes, semicolons, spaces, and Unicode.

title: Remote Bridge authenticates only the sender and leaves telemetry unauthenticated and unencrypted
recommendation: Use TLS 1.3 mutual authentication or a transcript-bound mutual challenge plus per-frame AEAD. Authenticate peer identities, length and sequence; reject replays; use random keys/HKDF and a memory-hard KDF for passphrases.

title: The advertised tamper-evident event ledger neither persists nor verifies event HMACs
recommendation: Sign a canonical representation including details, persist signatures in SQLite and DLQ, verify every read/import, visibly reject invalid records, migrate the schema, and consider chained hashes/checkpoints for deletion detection.

title: A single MCP SSE connection monopolizes the single-threaded server
recommendation: Use ThreadingHTTPServer or async I/O; cap sessions and response queues; enforce a small request-body limit and timeouts; add a live SSE-plus-POST concurrency test.
